text.en: Creative Director with 20+ years of experience across education, consulting, healthcare, and tourism, turning complex business goals into high-performing creative systems that grow long-term value and revenue.
text.hr: Kreativni direktor s više od 20 godina iskustva u obrazovanju, savjetovanju, zdravstvu i turizmu, pretvarajući složene poslovne ciljeve u visoko učinkovite kreativne sustave koji povećavaju dugoročnu vrijednost i prihod.
